reviews.author: Sri Lakshmi
reviews.review_body: It's an ultra modern school with world-class infrastructure, well professional and humble staff. This is the right school for the child's holistic development with lot of fun filled indoor and outdoor activities. My two kids are enjoying the school time. As a parent we are also satisfied with the way they are approaching and letting us know everything about the activities done in the school on daily basis. Thank you so much St. Andrews world school of Gurugram.

reviews.school_name: St. Andrews World School Gurgaon - Sector 85

reviews.review_body: Awesome school with experienced teaching staff, coaches for all extra curricullar activities that promised at the time of admission. well done👍
